notes: Two same-color (matplotlib C0 #1f77b4) line series crossing once around x ≈ 6.1, y ≈ 4.87. Designed as the trace_with_continuity stress test described in extraction_recipes.md §3 'Curve-crossing failure'. A naive per-column-median trace would mis-attribute around the crossing column; the continuity tracer with unique pairwise assignment recovers both trajectories cleanly. Series A is sub-linear/quadratic upward (y ≈ 0.04x² + 0.30x + 1.47), Series B is linear downward (y ≈ -0.505x + 8.02). Legend box sits in the upper-left and was excluded from the color mask before tracing.
